verbGlossary.FUNDS: {source} provides the overall financial authorization for all construction work at a project {target}
verbGlossary.ALLOCATES TO: {source} is partitioned and assigned to {target} or location within the project for cost control
verbGlossary.BREAKS DOWN TO: {source} subdivides a lump-sum budget into {target}-specific cost segments at the floor or zone level
verbGlossary.CATEGORIZES SPEND AT: {source} classifies expenditures by trade or division for work performed at {target} or floor
verbGlossary.MAPS COST TO: {source} creates a structured cost hierarchy that ties financial transactions to a physical {target} in the project
verbGlossary.SCOPES WORK AT: {source} commitment defines the contracted scope of work at {target} or building
verbGlossary.DELIVERS MATERIAL TO: {source}schedules material delivery to a laydown or {target} for subsequent installation
verbGlossary.PRICES WORK ON: {source} assigns {target} price or lump sum to work performed at a specific floor or zone
verbGlossary.ORIGINATES AT: {source} is triggered by a field condition discovered at {target} or below-grade level
verbGlossary.ADJUSTS COST FOR: {source} revises the estimated cost impact for work at {target} or location
verbGlossary.MODIFIES SCOPE AT: {source} formally changes the subcontractor's contracted scope at {target} or floor
verbGlossary.REPRICES WORK IN: {source} adjusts the committed {target} rate or lump sum for work in a specific zone or wing
verbGlossary.BILLS OWNER FOR CHANGE AT: {source}cost of a scope change at {target} location through to the owner
verbGlossary.TRANSFERS BUDGET TO: {source} moves dollars between cost codes or line items assigned to {target} to cover overruns
verbGlossary.INCURRED AT: {source} is recorded against {target} location or exterior zone where the expenditure occurred
verbGlossary.CHARGES TO: {source} posts an actual dollar amount to {target} where the labor, material, or equipment was consumed
verbGlossary.BILLS WORK COMPLETED AT: Subcontractor invoice requests payment for work completed at {target} during the billing period
verbGlossary.DRAWS AGAINST WORK AT: Owner invoice or pay application requests payment from the owner for work completed at {target} location
verbGlossary.ITEMIZES VALUE BY: {source} breaks the contract amount into {target}-based line items for progress billing at each floor
verbGlossary.RESERVES SPEND FOR: {source}sets aside a budgeted amount for undefined or owner-selected work in {target} such as a wet area
verbGlossary.HEDGES RISK AT: {source} fund covers unforeseen conditions at high-risk {target}s such as below-grade levels where unknowns are common
verbGlossary.PROJECTS FINAL COST FOR: {source} or estimate at completion predicts the total cost to finish all work at {target}
verbGlossary.CURVES DISBURSEMENT ACROSS: {source}projection distributes anticipated payments over time for work planned across {target} or location
verbGlossary.SIGNALS OVERRUN ON: {source} variance identifies {target}s or levels where actual or committed costs exceed the approved budget
verbGlossary.TRACKS ESCALATION AT: {source} measures the rate at which costs are increasing relative to original budget at {target}
verbGlossary.MONITORS DRAWDOWN AT: {source} burn rate tracks how fast the contingency reserve is being consumed at a high-risk {target}
